info.title: Convixx API
info.description:
Multi-tenant AI Voice Calling Platform backend. RAG-based question answering with self-hosted LLM and OpenAI fallback.

**Documentation:** Interactive UI at `/docs`. Raw OpenAPI JSON at `/docs/json` (same origin as this API).

servers.description: Current host (recommended for Try it out)

tags.name: Health
tags.description: Liveness checks for API, Postgres, pgvector, LLM, and embeddings.

tags.name: Customers
tags.description: Admin-only customer CRUD and API key issuance (`x-admin-token`).

tags.name: Knowledgebase
tags.description: Q&A upload and CRUD with embeddings (`x-api-key`).

tags.name: Settings
tags.description: Per-customer runtime tunables stored in the `customer_settings` table. Tenant-editable GET/PATCH `/settings` (`x-api-key`). Admin-only GET/PATCH `/admin/customers/{customerId}/settings` and reset (`x-admin-token`). See docs/SETTINGS_AND_FEATURES_CATALOG.md for the full field list, scope, and defaults.

tags.name: Avatars
tags.description: Per-customer reusable voice personas. Bundles TTS provider, model, speaker and pace/pitch/loudness, with an optional per-language override map. Agents reference an avatar via `avatar_id`. Tenant-scoped (`x-api-key`).

tags.name: Voice
tags.description: Sarvam speech-to-text and text-to-speech (`x-api-key`). For ElevenLabs workspace voices and avatars, see the **ElevenLabs** tag.

tags.name: ElevenLabs
tags.description: ElevenLabs workspace **voices** (speaker picker) and tenant-scoped **ElevenLabs avatars** stored in `elevenlabs_avatars`. Use avatars when `customer_settings.tts_provider` is `elevenlabs`; link an agent with `agents.elevenlabs_avatar_id`. Listing voices uses the server `ELEVENLABS_API_KEY`; all routes require `x-api-key`.

tags.name: Exotel Voicebot
tags.description: Multi-tenant Exotel Voicebot WebSocket system. Admin CRUD for per-tenant Exotel settings, live session monitoring, HTTPS bootstrap, and WebSocket status (`x-admin-token`).

tags.name: Admin logs
tags.description: Daily rotating API log files on disk (`convixx-YYYY-MM-DD.log`). Listing and download require `x-admin-token`. Logs are written whenever the server process runs (PM2, systemd, etc.), not only when an SSH session is open.

AdminToken.name: x-admin-token
AdminToken.description: Admin token for customer APIs. Set in .env as ADMIN_TOKEN.

ApiKey.name: x-api-key
ApiKey.description: Customer API key. Scopes KB, agents, ask, chat, voice to that customer.

CustomerSettings.description: Full customer_settings row. See docs/SETTINGS_AND_FEATURES_CATALOG.md for field-by-field scope and defaults.

voicebot_enabled.description: Admin-only. Master on/off switch for the voicebot on this tenant.

voicebot_multilingual.description: If true, STT returns language tags and TTS can pick a voice per language (via avatars.language_voice_map).

default_language_code.description: BCP-47 code (e.g. en-IN, hi-IN, mr-IN) used when the caller's language cannot be detected.

allowed_language_codes.description: List of BCP-47 codes offered to the caller.

stt_provider.description: Admin-only today; current code always uses Sarvam STT.

tts_model.description: Admin-only. Sarvam TTS model (e.g. bulbul:v2, bulbul:v3).

tts_default_speaker.description: Sarvam speaker id used when agent/avatar has none.

tts_default_sample_rate.description: Admin-only. Must be 8000 for Exotel voicebot.

rag_use_openai_only.description: If true, RAG uses OpenAI only (no self-hosted LLM).

rag_history_max_turns.description: Cap on chat-history turns appended to the RAG prompt. null = no cap.

rag_distance_threshold.description: Vector distance cutoff (null = use code default).

rag_streaming_enabled.description: Stream LLM tokens back to the client (roadmap).

no_kb_fallback_instruction.description: Sentence used when the KB returns no match.

vad_energy_threshold.description: Admin-only. PCM energy level below which audio counts as silence.

max_utterance_buffer_bytes.description: Admin-only. Hard ceiling on inbound audio buffer size.

max_utterance_seconds.description: Admin-only. Not enforced in current code path; buffer-byte ceiling is used instead.

stop_words.description: Keywords that end the current turn or trigger menu/operator.

business_hours.description: Weekly schedule (e.g. {"mon": ["09:00-18:00"], "tue": ["09:00-18:00"]}). Empty object = always on.

holiday_calendar.description: Array of {date, label} objects, e.g. [{"date":"2026-01-26","label":"Republic Day"}].

webhook_secret.description: Admin-only. Shared HMAC secret used to sign outbound webhooks.

CustomerSettingsPatch.description: Partial update. Every field is OPTIONAL. On the tenant endpoint, admin-only fields (`voicebot_enabled`, `stt_model`, `tts_model`, `tts_default_sample_rate`, `tts_output_codec`, `llm_model_override`, `openai_model`, `vad_*`, `max_utterance_*`, `echo_cancel_level`, `barge_in_min_speech_ms`, `barge_in_energy_threshold`, `language_switch_timeout_ms`, `language_switch_max_attempts`, `max_call_duration_seconds`, `max_concurrent_calls`, `end_call_silence_timeout_sec`, `outbound_enabled`, `webhook_secret`, `webhook_retry_attempts`) return 403. On the admin endpoint, every field is accepted.

LanguageVoiceMapEntry.description: Per-language override for an avatar. Any omitted field falls back to the avatar's top-level value, then to `customer_settings`.

Avatar.description: A reusable voice persona scoped to the customer. Agents may reference one via `agents.avatar_id`.

tone.description: Free-form label (e.g. friendly, formal, energetic, calm).

tts_speaker.description: Sarvam speaker id OR ElevenLabs voice id.

is_default.description: At most one default avatar per customer.

AvatarUpdate.description: Partial update — every field is optional.

ElevenlabsVoiceSettings.description: Maps to ElevenLabs TTS JSON field `voice_settings` (snake_case). Stored on `elevenlabs_avatars.voice_settings` and optional per-locale in `language_voice_map`.

stability.description: Voice consistency vs expressiveness. Lower values allow more emotional range; higher values sound steadier (typical default ~0.5).

similarity_boost.description: How closely synthesis matches the source voice (typical default ~0.75).

style.description: Style strength; availability depends on the ElevenLabs model.

speed.description: Playback speed multiplier when the model supports it.

use_speaker_boost.description: If true, increases similarity to the original speaker (may add latency).

ElevenlabsLanguageVoiceMapEntry.description: Per-language override for an ElevenLabs avatar. Parent object keys are BCP-47 tags (e.g. `hi-IN`, `en-IN`). Omitted fields fall back to the avatar’s top-level `voice_id` / `model_id` / `voice_settings`.

voice_settings.description: Optional locale-specific tuning; merges over the avatar-level `voice_settings` for TTS calls in that language.

ElevenlabsAvatar.description: Row in `elevenlabs_avatars`. Used when the tenant uses ElevenLabs TTS; agents reference it via `agents.elevenlabs_avatar_id`. Not used for Sarvam — use `/avatars` instead.

name.description: Display name unique per customer (e.g. “Support EN/HI”).

voice_id.description: Default ElevenLabs voice id for synthesis when no `language_voice_map` entry matches the active locale.

model_id.description: Default ElevenLabs TTS model id. If null, runtime falls back to `customer_settings.tts_model` or server env default.

voice_settings.description: Default ElevenLabs `voice_settings` object (JSON). Merged with locale entry’s `voice_settings` when present.

language_voice_map.description: Map of BCP-47 code → `{ voice_id?, model_id?, voice_settings? }` for multilingual calls.

is_default.description: At most one default ElevenLabs avatar per customer (partial unique index).

is_active.description: Inactive avatars are ignored when resolving persona.

model_id.description: Default TTS model id; null uses tenant/env default.

is_default.description: If true, clears other defaults for this customer and sets this row as default.

is_active.description: Default true. Set false to retire without deleting.

ElevenlabsAvatarUpdate.description: Partial update — all fields optional; at least one required by the API.

ElevenlabsVoiceSummary.description: Shape follows ElevenLabs `Voice` object; extra fields may be present. Use `voice_id` in avatars and `labels.language` for filtering.

voice_id.description: Use this value as `voice_id` on avatars / agents.

high_quality_base_model_ids.description: Model ids recommended for this voice.

settings.description: Voice default settings from ElevenLabs (if returned).

ElevenlabsVoicesListResponse.description: Convixx wrapper: forwards ElevenLabs `voices` array, optionally filtered by `language` query param.

filtered_by_language.description: BCP-47 tag applied **after** fetch (matches `labels.language` / name); null if no filter.

get.description:
Returns basic API health and timestamp.
No authentication required.

Verifies connection to PostgreSQL database.
Returns 503 if connection fails.

Checks if pgvector extension is installed.
Required for embeddings and vector search.

Tests connection to self-hosted LLM at ai.convixx.in.
Sends a simple prompt and returns response.

Verifies embedding generation works.
Returns vector dimensions (384 for nomic-embed-text).

Returns how many daily log files exist under the configured log directory (`LOG_DIR`, default `logs/`), with size and a relative download path for each.

Requires `x-admin-token`.

log_directory.description: Absolute path on the server where log files are stored

file_log_enabled.description: Whether the API is configured to append to daily files (`LOG_FILE_ENABLED`)

download_path.description: Relative URL to download this day (GET with same admin token)

get.summary: Download log file for a day
get.description:
Streams the log file for the given UTC calendar day (`YYYY-MM-DD`). Response is newline-delimited JSON (Pino) with `Content-Disposition: attachment`.

Requires `x-admin-token`.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: UTC date matching the log filename `convixx-{date}.log`

404.description: No log file for that date

example.error: Log file not found for this date
example.hint: Log files are rotated by UTC day (convixx-YYYY-MM-DD.log).

delete.summary: Delete log file for a day
delete.description:
Deletes the daily log file for the given UTC day (`YYYY-MM-DD`). Useful for server-space cleanup.

Requires `x-admin-token`.

404.description: No log file for that date

example.error: Log file not found for this date
example.hint: Log files are rotated by UTC day (convixx-YYYY-MM-DD.log).

get.description:
Downloads the current UTC day's log file directly (equivalent to `GET /admin/logs/{utcDate}`).

Requires `x-admin-token`.

404.description: No log file for UTC today

example.error: Log file not found for this date
example.hint: Log files are rotated by UTC day (convixx-YYYY-MM-DD.log).

post.description:
Creates a new customer with optional system prompt.
Requires x-admin-token. Returns customer with UUID.

get.description:
Returns all customers ordered by creation date.
Requires x-admin-token.

Returns a single customer by ID.
Requires x-admin-token.

put.description:
Updates customer name and/or system_prompt.
Requires x-admin-token. At least one field must be provided.

example.name: MarriageWale Premium
example.system_prompt: You are a premium support agent.

post.description:
Generates a new API key for the customer.
Requires x-admin-token. Key is used for KB, ask, agents, chat, and voice.

Creates an agent with name, description, system prompt.
Requires x-api-key. Each agent has its own system prompt.

greeting_text.description: Text spoken when the voicebot answers a call. Null uses system default.

error_text.description: Text spoken when pipeline fails (e.g. LLM timeout). Null uses system default.

tts_pace.description: Speech speed modifier (e.g., 0.85 for slower, 1.0 for normal).

tts_speaker.description: Sarvam speaker ID for voice persona (e.g., 'amartya'). Leave null for default.

tts_sample_rate.description: Audio sample rate in Hz. Exotel requires 8000.

avatar_id.description: Optional FK to `avatars` (Sarvam-oriented persona). Used when `tts_provider` is `sarvam`.

elevenlabs_avatar_id.description: Optional FK to `elevenlabs_avatars`. Used when `customer_settings.tts_provider` is `elevenlabs`.

example.name: Sales Agent
example.error_text: We are busy right now, please try again.

get.description:
Returns all agents for the authenticated customer.
Requires x-api-key.

example.name: Sales Agent
example.error_text: We are busy right now, please try again.

get.description:
Returns a single agent by ID.
Requires x-api-key. Agent must belong to customer.

example.name: Sales Agent
example.error_text: We are busy right now, please try again.

put.description:
Updates agent name, description, or system_prompt.
Requires x-api-key. At least one field required.

tts_pace.description: Speech speed modifier (e.g., 0.85 for slower, 1.0 for normal).

tts_speaker.description: Sarvam speaker ID for voice persona (e.g., 'amartya'). Leave null for default.

tts_sample_rate.description: Audio sample rate in Hz. Exotel requires 8000.

example.name: Premium Sales Agent
example.system_prompt: You are a premium sales agent.
example.greeting_text: Hello VIP, welcome to premium sales!
example.error_text: Pardon us, our premium service is delayed.

delete.description:
Deletes an agent permanently.
Requires x-api-key.

post.description:
Uploads Q&A pairs to the customer knowledgebase.
Requires x-api-key. Each question is embedded and stored for vector search.

get.description:
Returns all KB entries for the authenticated customer.
Requires x-api-key.

Returns a single KB entry by ID.
Requires x-api-key.

put.description:
Updates question and/or answer. Re-embeds if question changes.
Requires x-api-key. At least one field required.

example.question: What exactly is MarriageWale?
example.answer: MarriageWale is a premium matrimonial app.

delete.description:
Deletes a KB entry permanently.
Requires x-api-key.

get.description: Returns `rag_use_openai_only`: when true, RAG uses OpenAI only (self-hosted LLM is not called). Stored per customer. Requires x-api-key.

patch.description: Set `rag_use_openai_only`. When true, `/ask` and `/ask/voice` use OpenAI for RAG answers only (same KB context and prompts; self-hosted is skipped). When false, default pipeline (self-hosted with OpenAI fallback) applies. Requires x-api-key.

post.description:
RAG-based question answering. Uses vector search + LLM.
Requires x-api-key. Optional agent_id and session_id for multi-agent and chat threads.
If the customer has `rag_use_openai_only` enabled (see GET `/settings/rag`), RAG uses OpenAI only.

question_language_code.description: Optional BCP-47 tag (e.g. hi-IN). When the tenant has voicebot_multilingual enabled, non-English values are translated to English via Sarvam Translate for KB vector search only; the original question is still used for the LLM and chat history. Devanagari text without this field may still be detected for the same purpose.

example.answer: MarriageWale is located in Kolhapur, Maharashtra.

post.description:
Upload an audio question: Sarvam STT → same pipeline as `POST /ask` → Sarvam TTS on the answer.

**Requires:** `x-api-key` and `SARVAM_API_KEY`.

**Multipart form fields:**
- `file` (required) — audio (WAV, MP3, AAC, FLAC, OGG)
- `session_id` (optional, uuid)
- `agent_id` (optional, uuid)
- `stt_mode` — transcribe | translate | verbatim | translit | codemix (default transcribe)
- `language_code` — optional STT language hint (e.g. hi-IN)
- `stt_model` — optional, default saaras:v3
- `target_language_code` — TTS language (default en-IN): bn-IN, en-IN, gu-IN, hi-IN, kn-IN, ml-IN, mr-IN, od-IN, pa-IN, ta-IN, te-IN
- `speaker` — optional Bulbul voice (e.g. ritu)
- `speech_sample_rate` — optional, default 24000
- `output_audio_codec` — wav or mp3 (default wav)

**Response:** JSON with the same fields as `/ask` plus `transcript`, `stt_language_code`, `stt_request_id`, and `audio` `{ format, content_type, base64, request_id }`. On TTS failure, `audio` is null and `audio_error` explains.

200.description: Answer with transcript and base64 audio

example.answer: MarriageWale is located in Kolhapur, Maharashtra.

example.error: Missing audio file. Send multipart field `file` with WAV/MP3/AAC/FLAC/OGG.

get.description:
Returns all chat sessions for the customer, newest first.
Requires x-api-key. Includes message count per session.

Returns decrypted messages for a session in chronological order.
Requires x-api-key. Session must belong to customer.

example.content: We offer Sarja Raja Mini Carts and Yashwantrao Wada with pool.

example.error: Session not found or does not belong to this customer

get.description:
Temporary browser page: real-time mic → silence detection → `POST /ask/voice`. No auth to open; you still need `x-api-key` on the form for API calls.

Open in browser: `/voice/stream`

Lists Sarvam-backed STT/TTS languages, speakers, modes, and limits.
Requires x-api-key. No Sarvam call.

post.description:
Upload audio (multipart field `file`). Optional fields: `mode` (transcribe|translate|verbatim|translit|codemix), `language_code` (e.g. hi-IN), `model` (default saaras:v3).
Max ~30s audio. Server needs SARVAM_API_KEY.

Synthesize speech with Bulbul v3 (default). Use `speaker` (lowercase), `pace` 0.5–2.0, `speech_sample_rate`, `output_audio_codec` (wav|mp3|…), `temperature` (v3).

**Response:** Default is JSON with base64 in `audios` (the string can be very long). For **raw audio** use query `?response_format=binary` or `?download=1`, or send header `Accept: audio/wav` (or `audio/mpeg` for mp3). Use `?response_format=json` to force JSON. Optional `filename=myclip` sets the download basename.

parameters.name: Accept
parameters.description: If this header includes an audio media type (e.g. `audio/wav`, `audio/mpeg`, `audio/*`), the response is raw bytes like `response_format=binary`. Use `?response_format=json` to force JSON.

parameters.name: response_format
parameters.description: Use `binary` to return raw audio bytes with Content-Disposition: attachment (save in Postman / browser). Omit or `json` for Sarvam JSON with base64 `audios`.

parameters.name: filename
parameters.description: Download file basename without extension; extension matches `output_audio_codec` (e.g. wav). Default `speech`.

200.description: JSON with base64 audios, or raw audio when `response_format=binary`, `download=1`, or `Accept` includes an audio type

audio/wav.example: (raw WAV bytes — use Save Response in Postman)

get.description:
Returns the per-tenant Exotel configuration for a customer.

`exotel_api_key` and `exotel_api_token` are never returned — only `has_api_key` and `has_api_token`.

`voicebot_wss_url` and `voicebot_bootstrap_https_url` are **always generated** by the server from `PUBLIC_API_HOST` (or the request host) and the path `customerId`; you do not configure them in the request body.

Requires `x-admin-token`.

404.description: No Exotel settings configured for this customer

example.error: Exotel settings not found for this customer

put.description:
Upserts the per-tenant Exotel configuration for a customer (one row per customer).

Optional fields: Exotel credentials, numbers, `is_enabled`, `use_sandbox`. Voicebot `wss://` and bootstrap `https://` URLs are **not** accepted here — they are computed and returned in the response.

Requires `x-admin-token`.

exotel_account_sid: String must contain at least 1 character(s)

delete.description:
Removes all Exotel configuration for a customer. This will disable the Voicebot for this tenant.

Requires `x-admin-token`.

get.description:
Returns both **active** (in-memory, currently connected) and **recent** (from database, last 25) voicebot call sessions for a customer.

**Active sessions** include real-time info: stream_sid, call_sid, caller/called numbers, sample rate, duration, speaking state.
**Recent sessions** include DB-persisted call history with status, timestamps, and linked chat_session_id.

Requires `x-admin-token`.

Health check for the Voicebot WebSocket system. Returns total active sessions across all tenants.

No authentication required.

Returns the tenant's WebSocket URL as JSON `{ url: "wss://..." }`.

The `wss://` URL is always computed from `PUBLIC_API_HOST` (or the request `Host`) and the path `customerId`.

No authentication required (Exotel calls this).

example.error: Voicebot not configured for this tenant

get.description: Returns the full `customer_settings` row for the authenticated customer. Defaults are guaranteed — every customer has a row (auto-created on customer insert, or backfilled by migration 005).

patch.description: Partial update of `customer_settings`. Admin-only fields (see `CustomerSettingsPatch` description) are rejected with 403. Send only the fields you want to change — omitted fields are left untouched.

403.description: One or more fields are admin-only

get.description: Admin view of `customer_settings` for any customer. Requires `x-admin-token`.

patch.summary: Admin: update any customer settings field
patch.description: Partial update of `customer_settings` with no scope check — admins may edit every field, including admin-only ones.

post.description: Deletes the customer's `customer_settings` row and re-inserts a fresh one, so every column reverts to its database default (see `CustomerSettings` schema).

get.description: Returns every avatar belonging to the authenticated customer, default first.

post.description: Creates a new avatar for the authenticated customer. If `is_default=true`, any previous default is demoted atomically.

409.description: An avatar with that name already exists for this customer

example.error: Avatar with this name already exists for this customer

put.description: Partial update. Setting `is_default` to true demotes any previous default atomically.

409.description: Name conflict with another avatar for this customer

delete.description: Deletes the avatar. Any agents referencing it have `agents.avatar_id` set to NULL via FK `ON DELETE SET NULL`.

post.description: Sets this avatar as the default for the customer. The previous default (if any) is demoted atomically. At most one default avatar exists per customer (enforced by a partial unique index).

get.description:
Proxies ElevenLabs `GET /v1/voices` using the server **ELEVENLABS_API_KEY**. Tenant auth: **x-api-key**.

**Query behavior**
- `language` — optional BCP-47 tag (e.g. `hi-IN`). When set, the response `voices` array is **filtered client-side** to entries whose `labels.language` or `name` matches (best-effort).
- `show_legacy`, `page_size`, `next_page_token` — forwarded to ElevenLabs when supported, for pagination and legacy voices.

Returns `{ voices, filtered_by_language }`. Full voice objects may include extra fields from ElevenLabs.

parameters.name: language
parameters.description: BCP-47 tag. Filters the returned `voices` after fetch (primary language subtag + `labels.language`). Omit to return all voices (subject to ElevenLabs account).

parameters.name: show_legacy
parameters.description: Forwarded to ElevenLabs. If true, include legacy voices in the workspace list.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Forwarded to ElevenLabs for paginated listing when supported.

parameters.name: next_page_token
parameters.description: Forwarded to ElevenLabs to fetch the next page when the upstream response includes pagination tokens.

example.error: ELEVENLABS_API_KEY is not configured on this server

get.description: Returns all `elevenlabs_avatars` rows for the authenticated customer (default first, then name). Use with `tts_provider: elevenlabs` and `agents.elevenlabs_avatar_id`.

post.description: Creates a persona row with default `voice_id`, optional `model_id`, `voice_settings`, and per-locale `language_voice_map`. If `is_default` is true, other defaults for this customer are cleared atomically.

example.error: ElevenLabs avatar with this name already exists for this customer

put.description: Partial update. Setting `is_default: true` demotes other defaults atomically.

delete.description: Deletes the row. `agents.elevenlabs_avatar_id` is set to NULL for rows that referenced this avatar (`ON DELETE SET NULL`).

post.description: Marks this avatar as the customer default (demotes others). At most one default per customer.
